  • Method Details

    • checkAndLoadMap

      public File checkAndLoadMap(List<MapIO> mapList)
      Method for checking if the map is valid or not, then uploading it to play the tournament
      Parameters:
      mapList - List of maps to be updated when a file is uploaded
      Returns:
      Map File

    • playGame

      public HashMap<Player,Integer> playGame(List<Player> playerList, int numberOfTurnsToPlay, int gameCount, MapIO mapIO, javafx.scene.control.TextArea textArea)
      Method for controlling the flow of each game in the tournament
      Parameters:
      playerList - List of players playing
      numberOfTurnsToPlay - NUmber of turns to be played in each game
      gameCount - Number of the game being played
      mapIO - Map on which the game would be played
      textArea - Text Area where the game details would be printed
      Returns:
      HashMAp with the winner name and game number.
